Just include the necessary settings to run the simulation.
response:
<file_name>0/U</file_name>
dimensions [0 1 -1 0 0 0 0];
internalField uniform (0 0 0);
boundaryField {
    hotWall
    type            fixedValue;
    value           uniform (0 0 0);
    hotWall
    type            fixedValue;
    value           uniform (0 0 0);
    coldWall
    type            fixedValue;
    value           uniform (0 0 0);
    outlet
    type            zeroGradient;
    inlet
    type            fixedValue;
    value           uniform (0 0 0);
}
<file_name>0/T</file_name>
dimensions [0 0 0 1 0 0 0];
internalField uniform 300;
boundaryField {
    hotWall
    type            fixedValue;
    value           uniform 310;
    coldWall
    type            fixedValue;
    value           uniform 300;
    outlet
    type            zeroGradient;
    inlet
    type            fixedValue;
    value           uniform 300;
}
<file_name>constant/transportProperties</file_name>
type            volScalarField;
transportModel  Newtonian;
nu              [0 2 -1 0 0 0 0] 1e-05;
<file_name>constant/physicalProperties</file_name>
type            volScalarField;
rho             [1 -3 0 0 0 0 0] 1;
<file_name>constant/g</file_name>
type            vectorField;
value           uniform (0 -9.81 0);
<file_name>system/controlDict</file_name>
application     buoyantFoam;
startFrom       startTime;
startTime       0;
stopAt          endTime;
endTime         1000;
deltaT          1;
writeInterval   50;
purgeWrite      0;
writeFormat     ascii;
writePrecision  6;
writeCompression off;
timeFormat      general;
timePrecision   6;
runTimeModifiable yes;
<file_name>system/fvSchemes</file_name>
ddtSchemes {
    default         Euler;
}
gradSchemes {
    default         Gauss linear;
}
divSchemes {
    default         Gauss linear;
}
laplacianSchemes {
    default         Gauss linear corrected;
}
interpolationSchemes {
    default         linear;
}
snGradSchemes {
    default         corrected;
}
<file_name>system/fvSolution</file_name>
solvers {
    U
    {
        solver          PBiCG;
        preconditioner  DILU;
    }
    p
    {
        solver          GAMG;
        preconditioner  DILU;
        tolerance       1e-06;
        relTol          0.1;
    }
}
PIMPLE
{
    nOuterCorrectors 1;
    nCorrectors 2;
    nNonOrthogonalCorrectors 0;
    pRefCell        0;
    pRefValue       0;
}
simpleControls
{
    nNonOrthogonalCorrectors 0;
}
<file_name>system/blockMeshDict</file_name>
convertToMeters 1;
vertices
(
    (0 0 0)
    (9 0 0)
    (9 1 0)
    (0 1 0)
    (0 0 2)
    (9 0 2)
    (9 1 2)
    (0 1 2)
);
blocks
(
    hex (0 1 2 3 4 5 6 7) (90 10 20) simpleGrading (1 1 1)
);
mergePatchPairs ();
<file_name>constant/polyMesh/boundary
</file_name>
boundary
{
    hotWall
    {
        type            wall;
        faces
        (
            (1 0 3)
            (2 1 0)
            (3 2 1)
            (0 3 7)
            (7 6 5)
            (5 4 1)
        );
    }
    coldWall
    {
        type            wall;
        faces
        (
            (5 4 0)
            (4 7 0)
            (7 6 4)
            (0 1 5)
            (3 2 1)
            (1 0 4)
        );
    }
    outlet
    {
        type            patch;
        faces
        (
            (6 5 4)
            (7 6 4)
        );
    }
    inlet
    {
        type            patch;
        faces
        (
            (0 7 6)
            (0 6 5)
            (0 5 4)
            (0 4 3)
            (0 3 2)
            (0 2 1)
        );
    }
}

<similar_case_reference><index>

response:
<file_name>blockMeshDict</file_name>
<folder_name>system</folder_name>
<content>{Vertices
(
    (0 0 0)
    (9 0 0)
    (9 1 0)
    (0 1 0)
    (0 0 2)
    (9 0 2)
    (9 1 2)
    (0 1 2)
);
Blocks
(
    hex (0 1 2 3 4 5 6 7) (9 1 2) simpleGrading (1 1 1)
);
Edges
();
Faces
(
    frontAndBack
    {
        faces
        (
            {frontAndBack 0}
            {frontAndBack 4}
        )
    }
    hole
    {
        faces
        (
            {hole 5}
            {hole 1}
            {hole 3}
            {hole 7}
            {hole 6}
            {hole 2}
        )
    }
);
Boundary
(
    inlet
    {
        type            patch
        faces
        (
            {frontAndBack 3}
        )
    }
    outlet
    {
        type            patch
        faces
        (
            {frontAndBack 1}
        )
    }
    hotWall
    {
        type            wall
        faces
        (
            {frontAndBack 5}
        )
    }
    coldWall
    {
        type            wall
        faces
        (
            {frontAndBack 7}
        )
    }
    top
    {
        type            wall
        faces
        (
            {frontAndBack 6}
        )
    }
    bottom
    {
        type            wall
        faces
        faces
        (
            {frontAndBack 2}
        )
    }
);
MergePatchPairs
(
);}</content>
<similarity>high</similarity>
<match_level>high</match_level>
<advice>Adjusted vertices to 9 m × 1 m × 2 m and renamed walls to hotWall (310 K) and coldWall (300 K).</advice>

<file_name>controlDict</file_name>
<folder_name>system</folder_name>
<content>{application     buoyantFoam;

startFrom       startTime;
startTime       0;
stopAt          endTime;
endTime         1000;

deltaT          1;
writeInterval   50;
purgeWrite      0;
writeFormat     ascii;
writePrecision  6;
writeCompression off;

timeFormat      general;
timePrecision   6;
runTimeModifiable yes;

adjustTimeStep  no;
maxCo           0.5;

maxDeltaT       10;

writeFields
{
    fields
    {
        U
        T
        p
    }
}
}
</content>
<similarity>high</similarity>
<match_level>high</match_level>
<advice>Set endTime=1000, deltaT=1, writeInterval=50, and ensured no post‑processing options are included.</advice>

<file_name>g</file_name>
<folder_name>constant</folder_name>
<content>{internalField   uniform (0 -9.81 0);
boundaryField
{
    default
    {
        type            fixedValue;
        value           uniform (0 -9.81 0);
    }
    walls
    {
        type            fixedValue;
        value           uniform (0 -9.81 0);
    }
    patches
    {
        type            fixedValue;
        value           uniform (0 -9.81 0);
    }
}
}</content>
<similarity>high</similarity>
<match_level>high</match_level>
<advice>Defined gravitational acceleration of –9.81 m/s² in the y‑direction.</advice>

<file_name>U</file_name>
<folder_name>0</folder_name>
<content>{Boundary
{
    inlet
    {
        type            fixedValue;
        value           uniform (0 0 0);
    }
    outlet
    {
        type            zeroGradient;
    }
    hotWall
    {
        type            fixedValue;
        value           uniform (0 0 0);
    }
    coldWall
    {
        type            fixedValue;
        value           uniform (0 0 0);
    }
    top
    {
        type            noSlip;
    }
    bottom
    {
        type            noSlip;
    }
}
InitialConditions
{
    U
    {
        type            uniform;
        value           uniform (0 0 0);
    }
}
}
</content>
<similarity>high</similarity>
<match_level>high</match_level>
<advice>Set inlet velocity to zero, outlet to zeroGradient, walls to noSlip, and initialised U uniformly.</advice>

<file_name>T</file_name>
<folder_name>0</folder_name>
<content>{Boundary
{
    inlet
    {
        type            fixedValue;
        value           uniform 300;
    }
    outlet
    {
        type            zeroGradient;
    }
    hotWall
    {
        type            fixedValue;
        value           uniform 310;
    }
    coldWall
    {
        type            fixedValue;
        value           uniform 300;
    }
    top
    {
        type            zeroGradient;
    }
    bottom
    {
        type            zeroGradient;
    }
}
InitialConditions
{
    T
    {
        type            uniform;
        value           uniform 300;
    }
}
}
</content>
<similarity>high</similarity>
<match_level>high</match_level>
<advice>Assigned hotWall temperature 310 K, coldWall 300 K, and zeroGradient for outlet/top/bottom.</advice>

<file_name>epsilon</file_name>
<folder_name>constant</folder_name>
<content>{RAS
{
    RASModel        laminar;
    turbulence      off;
    printCoeffs     off;
}
}
</content>
<similarity>high</similarity>
<match_level>high</match_level>
<advice>Set laminar model as required for a low‑Reynolds Bernard cell simulation.</advice>

<file_name>k</file_name>
<folder_name>constant</folder_name>
<content>{k   uniform 0;
}
</content>
<similarity>high</similarity>
<match_level>high</match_level>
<advice>Turbulent kinetic energy set to zero for laminar case.</advice>

<file_name>nut</file_name>
<folder_name>constant</folder_name>
<content>{nuTurbulence
{
    model         laminar;
}
}
</content>
<similarity>high</similarity>
<match_level>high</match_level>
<advice>Turbulent viscosity set to zero for laminar simulation.</advice>

<file_name>p</file_name>
<folder_name>0</folder_name>
<content>{Boundary
{
    inlet
    {
        type            zeroGradient;
    }
    outlet
    {
        type            fixedValue;
        value           uniform 0;
    }
    hotWall
    {
        type            zeroGradient;
    }
    coldWall
    {
        type            zeroGradient;
    }
    top
    {
        type            zeroGradient;
    }
    bottom
    {
        type            zeroGradient;
    }
}
InitialConditions
{
    p
    {
        type            uniform;
        value           uniform 0;
    }
}
}
</content>
<similarity>high</similarity>
<match_level>high</match_level>
<advice>Set pressure boundary conditions consistent with incompressible buoyant flow.</advice>

<file_name>p_rgh</file_name>
<folder_name>0</folder_name>
<content>{Boundary
{
    inlet
    {
        type            zeroGradient;
    }
    outlet
    {
        type            fixedValue;
        value           uniform 0;
    }
    hotWall
    {
        type            zeroGradient;
    }
    coldWall
    {
        type            zeroGradient;
    }
    top
    {
        type            zeroGradient;
    }
    bottom
    {
        type            zeroGradient;
    }
}
InitialConditions
{
    p_rgh
    {
        type            uniform;
        value           uniform 0;
    }
}
}
</content>
<similarity>high</similarity>
<match_level>high</match_level>
<advice>Initialised p_rgh to zero to start the pressure‑correction loop.</advice>

<file_name>physicalProperties</file_name>
<folder_name>constant</folder_name>
<content>{transportModel   laminar;
transportModelCoeffs
{
    mu          [ 1 1 -1 0 0 0 0 ] 1e-3;
}
}
</content>
<similarity>high</similarity>
<match_level>high</match_level>
<advice>Defined laminar dynamic viscosity for water‑like fluid.</advice>

<file_name>momentumTransport</file_name>
<folder_name>constant</folder_name>
<content>{mu
{
    transportModel   Newtonian;
    mu              [ 1 1 -1 0 0 0 0 ] 1e-3;
}
}
</content>
<similarity>high</similarity>
<match_level>high</match_level>
<advice>Consistent Newtonian viscosity definition.</advice>

Usage: blockMesh [OPTIONS]
options:
  -blockTopology    write block edges and centres as .obj files
  -case <dir>       specify alternate case directory, default is the cwd
  -dict <file>      read control dictionary from specified location
  -fileHandler <handler>

  -noFunctionObjects

  -region <name>    specify alternative mesh region
  -srcDoc           display source code in browser
  -doc              display application documentation in browser
  -help             print the usage

Block description

  For a given block, the correspondence between the ordering of
  vertex labels and face labels is shown below.
  For vertex numbering in the sequence 0 to 7 (block, centre):
    faces 0 (f0) and 1 are left and right, respectively;
    faces 2 and 3 are front and back; 
    and faces 4 and 5 are bottom and top::

                 7 ---- 6
            f5   |\     |\   f3
            |    | 4 ---- 5   \
            |    3 |--- 2 |    \
            |     \|     \|    f2
            f4     0 ---- 1

       Z         f0 ----- f1
       |  Y
       | /
       O --- X
